revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Commons category link is defined as the pagename]] to [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:dd]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia40]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia40]] to [[Category:Categories from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Shooting sports]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories from wikipedia
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 3 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q7013414)
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]]"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q7013414)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
